name: JWT auth middleware
description: Protect API routes with JWT bearer tokens (HS256).

name: Keycloak auth middleware
description: Validate Bearer tokens against a Keycloak introspection endpoint.

name: API token auth
description: Protect API routes using X-API-Token or Authorization: Bearer <token>.

name: BGP.tools lookup
description: Load BGP.tools prefix/ASN datasets and expose IP/ASN lookup endpoints with RAM+disk cache.

name: Redis cache
description: Add Redis cache endpoints with optional in-memory L1 cache.

name: CORS middleware
description: Add configurable CORS middleware for browser clients.

name: SMTP connector
description: Add SMTP connectivity check endpoint at /mail/smtp/ping.

name: RabbitMQ connector
description: Add RabbitMQ ping and publish test endpoints.

name: Rate limit middleware
description: Add IP-based request rate limiting middleware.

name: Request ID middleware
description: Inject and propagate request IDs on all HTTP requests.

name: Cron scheduler
description: Add cron-based background scheduler with /cron/health endpoint.

name: Secure headers middleware
description: Add common HTTP security headers to all responses.
